origin.name: Iraq
origin.key_document: Arabic death certificate from civil registration office (requires certified English translation)
origin.source: FCDO Iraq travel advice, updated 2025; British Embassy Baghdad guidance
origin.cremation_note: Cremation is not permitted under Iraqi law. Full body repatriation is the only option.

destinations.name: United Kingdom
key_documents: Arabic death certificate (certified English translation required)
special_rules: The FCDO advises against all travel to Iraq except the Kurdistan Region. Consular assistance in other parts of Iraq is severely limited.
A consulate in Erbil covers the Kurdistan Region.
All Arabic-language documentation requires certified English translation for UK acceptance.
Contact the FCDO emergency line immediately: +44 (0)20 7008 5000.
destinations.dest_reception: The UK funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. All Iraqi documentation must be in certified English translation. The coroner for the district is notified. Straightforward cases proceed directly to funeral arrangements.
destinations.dest_consular_note: FCDO 24-hour emergency line: +44 (0)20 7008 5000. The British Embassy in Baghdad and consulate in Erbil provide consular assistance with significant limitations. They cannot pay for or arrange repatriation.
destinations.seo_title: Iraq to UK Repatriation: Guidance for Families
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in Iraq. Repatriation to the UK takes 3-6 weeks. FCDO liaison, Arabic translation, and exit permits all handled. Contact us 24/7.
